---
title: 'Under Development'
date: '2010-02-20T19:27:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2896875740308454061'
blogger_filename: '/2010/02/under-development.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
---

<span xmlns=''><p> 02.20.10<br /></p><p><br /> </p><p>Some of noticed that I haven't written much the last two weeks. So I will admit that I have been lazy. I've read my bible most of the days, but haven't gotten on the web. I also allowed myself to get distracted with games that I have since erased from my computer, not because they were "bad" but because they were causing a distraction from more important and lasting matters. One of those matters is this blog, which was a commitment I made to myself more than to any reader. So I will still be working on the blog, but I haven't decided if I am able to commit to doing it daily. I may be changing to a weekly review. We'll see. If any reader finds that the postings ebb and flow to more and less frequent, you'll know why. <br /></p><p><br /> </p><p>Darrell G. Wolfe</p></span>
